name: Apple iPhone 15 Pro
description: The Apple iPhone 15 Pro features a titanium design, A17 Pro chip, advanced triple-camera system, and a stunning Super Retina XDR display.

name: Samsung Galaxy S24 Ultra
description: Samsung Galaxy S24 Ultra comes with a powerful Snapdragon processor, 200MP camera, S Pen support, and AI-powered features.

name: Sony WH-1000XM5 Headphones
description: Industry-leading noise canceling wireless headphones with premium sound quality and up to 30 hours of battery life.

name: Dell XPS 15 Laptop
description: A high-performance laptop with Intel Core i7 processor, 16GB RAM, OLED display, and sleek premium design.

name: Apple Watch Series 9
description: Smartwatch with advanced health tracking, fitness features, bright display, and seamless Apple ecosystem integration.

name: Canon EOS R6 Camera
description: Professional mirrorless camera offering 4K video recording, fast autofocus, and exceptional low-light performance.

name: Nike Air Max 270
description: Comfortable and stylish running shoes featuring Max Air cushioning and breathable mesh materials.

name: Logitech MX Master 3S Mouse
description: Ergonomic wireless mouse designed for productivity with ultra-fast scrolling and customizable controls.

name: Amazon Kindle Paperwhite
description: Waterproof e-reader with glare-free display, adjustable warm light, and weeks of battery life.

name: JBL Flip 6 Bluetooth Speaker
description: Portable waterproof Bluetooth speaker with powerful sound, deep bass, and long-lasting battery performance.
